gate_type: frontend content deploy to existing Azure Static Web App + smoke + docs (uncommitted)
ready_for_slava_manual_retest_reason: Frontend live at https://kind-meadow-03cf73103.7.azurestaticapps.net — fully interactive on mock data; deep links + assets work. Live-API wiring deferred (API CORS hardcoded to localhost).
scope_summary: Deployed the Vite SPA (mock mode) into the existing SWA (Free) production env via SWA CLI. SPA live + smoke PASS. Backend-wiring deferred: API CORS is hardcoded to localhost:5173 (no ACAO for the SWA origin) so a browser would be blocked, though the backend serves real data without SQL. No new resources, no SQL/AI/AKS/ACR, no source commit. Opus /qa-inspector CLEARED 9/9.
qa_inspector: Opus /qa-inspector END gate -> CLEARED 9/9 (independent verification; CORS claim confirmed, secret/token safety confirmed)
